notes: User reviewed v11 gate blockers and confirmed several raw detector/fallback windows were not actual card slides.
Harness fix before this pass: visual review sheets now prioritize reviewed revealStartSeconds/cutStartSeconds before raw revealStartCandidateSeconds.
Use wider source sheets as authority when user notes said the short review sheet contained no slide or only sorting.

reviews.note: Luke Altmyer: v11 was still in the Van Buren/Houser area. Wide source sheet shows Houser -> Altmyer slide beginning around original 5:49.1.
Troy Stellato: v11 fallback was all Stellato. Wide sheet shows Mauigoa -> Stellato slide beginning around original 9:41.0.
Kaidon Salter: v11 fallback missed the slide. Focused pack 10 sheet shows Wysong -> Salter starting around original 10:30.1.
Behren Morton: align with the first real Salter -> Morton upward slide in the focused pack 10 sheet.
Danny O'Neil: final card in pack still needs a reveal start for Morton -> O'Neil; no following transition is needed after it.
LeShon Williams: v11 fallback landed after the slide was mostly over. Wide source sheet shows Brendon Lewis -> Williams starting around original 11:37.6.
RJ Maryland: pack 13 wide sheet showed the raw detector had drifted late; set the actual Talyn Taylor -> RJ Maryland reveal.

Taylor Tatum: v11 window was sorting/holding multiple cards near 12:39. Wide pack 13 sheet and v12 spot-check show the RJ Maryland -> Taylor Tatum reveal beginning around original 12:30.8; hold from the clean post-reveal display.
Quintrevion Wisner Path to Glory: v11 detection used the earlier Diego Pavia reveal. Wide sheet shows Pavia -> Wisner beginning around original 15:36.4.
Malik Rutherford: v11 fallback was no-slide. Wide sheet shows Dante Moore -> Rutherford beginning around original 17:27.7.
Jayden Virgin-Morgan: v11 detector did not land on the reveal. Wide sheet shows Rutherford -> Virgin-Morgan beginning around original 17:33.4.
Jerrick Gibson: use the first visible Chase Sowell -> Gibson slide from the wide pack 19 sheet.
Gunner Stockton Acropolis: v11 fallback had no slide. Wide pack 19 sheet and v12 spot-check show Gibson -> Stockton beginning around original 18:33.4.
